productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Charcoal Shirt
description: Composition Charcoal coloured shirt made of 100% cotton with grey accents, has full sleeves and double buttoned cuffs, spread collar, front buttoned placket and a pocket on the left chest Fit Regular Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron Do not iron on decorations Get casual and comfortable in style with this charcoal coloured shirt from united colors of benetton. The full sleeves are sure to keep the chill away, while you can roll up the sleeves to suit the occasion. Team this with jeans and sports shoes for that cool, casual look. Model statistics The product is a size XL on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
